dependency_caveats: Depends on SLM-161 frozen decode scaffolding conventions.
External causal-LM scoring belongs to SLM-108, not this fixture.
disposition_rationale: Frozen semantic scoring materially exceeds nonsemantic baselines and produces a nontrivial meaningful-program rate, indicating a usable zero-training prior.
falsifier: The frozen scorer is statistically indistinguishable from strong nonsemantic baselines and produces no meaningful programs.
hypothesis: A frozen semantic scorer performs materially above random and frequency baselines on grammar-action ranking and produces some nontrivial end-to-end programs.
